messages.content: Get the weather in Oslo and the local time in Cairo.

function.description: Get local time for a city.
function.name: get_time

response.body_raw:
{"choices":[{"finish_reason":"stop","index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"I cannot directly provide the current weather in Oslo or the local time in Cairo. However, I can suggest some ways for you to get this information:

1. **Weather Websites**: You can check websites like AccuWeather, Weather.com, or the Norwegian Meteorological Institute (met.no) for the current weather in Oslo. Similarly, for Cairo, you can check websites like AccuWeather, Weather.com, or the Egyptian Meteorological Authority (ema.gov.eg).

2. **Local Time**: The local time in Cairo is currently UTC+2 (Central European Time). You can check the current time in Cairo using a world clock website or app.

3. **Google Search**: You can also use Google to search for the current weather in Oslo and Cairo. Simply type "current weather in Oslo" or "current weather in Cairo" and Google will provide you with the latest information.

4. **Mobile Apps**: There are many mobile apps available that provide real-time weather information and local time for various cities around the world. You can download these apps to get the latest information."}}],"created":1784574698,"model":"/Users/bbadmin/gguf/watt-tool-8B.Q4_K_M.gguf","system_fingerprint":"b10050-b15ca938a","object":"chat.completion","usage":{"completion_tokens":218,"prompt_tokens":22,"total_tokens":240,"prompt_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":5}},"id":"chatcmpl-BGK5K65uw9742mQRC85122C3nVfUKLKo","timings":{"cache_n":5,"prompt_n":17,"prompt_ms":55.517,"prompt_per_token_ms":3.2657058823529415,"prompt_per_second":306.2125114829692,"predicted_n":218,"predicted_ms":2461.701,"predicted_per_token_ms":11.29220642201835,"predicted_per_second":88.55665249354003}}
